title: Donation Reconciliation
objective: Reconcile donations, deposits, refunds, and campaign totals over a bounded period.

steps.description: Capture the reconciliation period, expected settlement sources, and whether campaign-level reconciliation is required.
Gather transactions, deposits, refunds, batches, and finance reconciliation summaries for the same window.
Separate timing differences from true data issues such as orphaned transactions, bad attribution, or duplicate deposits.
Check whether forms, campaigns, or fundraising pages contributed to the variance.
Draft approved adjustment options and the evidence behind each one.

escalation_rules: Treat unresolved financial variance as high severity.
Prefer aggregated evidence over row-by-row narrative when totals are available.
Escalate to system_health_diagnostics if settlement or reporting snapshots are stale.
